allow: Bash("C:/xampp/mysql/bin/mysql" -u root -e "CREATE DATABASE IF NOT EXISTS kairos CHARACTER SET utf8mb4 COLLATE utf8mb4_unicode_ci;")
Bash(/d/xampp/mysql/bin/mysql.exe -u root kairos -e "SELECT migration, batch FROM migrations ORDER BY batch, migration;" 2>&1)
Bash(/d/xampp/mysql/bin/mysql.exe -u root kairos -e "SELECT name FROM roles;")
Bash(/d/xampp/mysql/bin/mysql.exe -u root kairos -e "SELECT id, nombre FROM roles;")
Bash(/d/xampp/mysql/bin/mysql.exe -u root kairos -e "SELECT id, nombre FROM roles_institucion;")
Bash(/d/xampp/mysql/bin/mysql.exe -u root kairos -e "SELECT id, name FROM roles;")

Bash(/d/xampp/mysql/bin/mysql.exe -u root kairos -e "
SELECT i.id, i.sigla, i.nombre,
       IFNULL\(p.sigla, '—'\) AS padre
FROM instituciones i
LEFT JOIN instituciones p ON p.id = i.id_institucion_padre
ORDER BY i.id;" 2>&1)
